title: Farm Animals Song for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
COCK-A-DOODLE-DOO! The rooster wakes the farm!
Sing a fun farm animals song with Benny, a rooster, cow, duck, and sheep.
Toddlers learn friendly animal sounds in a bright morning cartoon.
Kid-safe sing-along fun for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
